description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that adds a preflight stage job named danger-review. The job should run always for pipelines whose $PIPELINE_TYPE matches the regex "/CANONICAL_(PROTECTED_BRANCH|MERGE_REQUEST)_PIPELINE/" and includes the external component danger-review version 1.4.1 from ${CI_SERVER_FQDN}/gitlab-org/components/danger-review/danger-review@1.4.1 with inputs job_allow_failure set to true and job_stage set to preflight. No image, services, caches, or artifacts are defined.
